feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: Pencarian Wisatawan Asal Amerika Belum Juga Ditemukan

link.title: Pencarian Wisatawan Asal Amerika Belum Juga Ditemukan

entry.content:
AMBON, KOMPAS.TV-Tim SAR gabungan pada hari kedua terus melakukan pencarian Carol Marie Laiken, penyelam asal California Amerika, hingga petang pencarian belum membuahkan hasil.
Penyelaman hari kedua dilakukan tiga tahap, yakni pada pagi hari, siang dan sore pada kedalaman dua puluh lima hingga tiga puluh meter.
Selain melakukan pencarian di dasar laut, tim sar gabungan juga melakukan pencarian dengan melakukan searching di permukaan laut Teluk Ambon, menggunakan perahu boath sar, TNI Angkatan Laut, Pol Air Polda Maluku dan rubber boath Pol Air Polda Maluku. Pencarian akan kembali dilanjutkan pada besok hari dengan radius yang lebih besar
entry.summary: AMBON, KOMPAS.TV-Tim SAR gabungan pada hari kedua terus melakukan pencarian Carol Marie Laiken, penyelam asal California Amerika, hingga petang pencarian belum membuahkan hasil. Penyelaman hari kedua dilakukan tiga tahap, yakni pada pagi hari, siang dan sore pada kedalaman dua puluh lima hingga tiga puluh meter. Selain melakukan pencarian di dasar laut, tim sar gabungan juga melakukan pencarian dengan melakukan searching di permukaan laut Teluk Ambon, menggunakan perahu boath sar, TNI Angkatan Laut, Pol Air Polda Maluku dan rubber boath Pol Air Polda Maluku. Pencarian akan kembali dilanjutkan pada besok hari dengan radius yang lebih besar

entry.title: Ariana Grande Shares PDA Filled Clips On Beau Dalton Gomez’s Birthday

link.title: Ariana Grande Shares PDA Filled Clips On Beau Dalton Gomez’s Birthday

entry.content:
Ariana Grande posted a few cute PDA’s on the occasion of her boyfried Dalton Gomez ‘s birthday. Since January Ariana Grande and Dalton Gomez have been dating and are socially distancing in her house in L.A. Check out the whole story.
Log On To Our Official Website :
For More Such News & Gossips Subscribe now! :

Since January Ariana Grande and Dalton Gomez have been dating and are socially distancing in her house in L.A. Check out the whole story. entry.title: As New York’s AG James Targets NRA, Unintended Consequences May Ensue

link.title: As New York’s AG James Targets NRA, Unintended Consequences May Ensue

entry.content:
New York Attorney General Letitia James has readied, aimed, and fired her first shot at the National Rifle Association.
CNN reports James has launched a stunningly bold suit to dissolve America’s top gun lobby group.
The NRA is one of the most feared forces in American politics, spending billions to weaken gun control initiatives after mass shootings.
It has also transformed the American constitutional right to bear arms into a cultural cause that dominates conservative politics.
James accuses LaPierre and three other top NRA officers of years of breathtaking corruption.
While destroying the organization over it would make her a hero among liberals, it may also have unintended consequences.
Democrats who need to win rural, conservative, swing-state voters may wish she had waited until after the election.
entry.summary: New York Attorney General Letitia James has readied, aimed, and fired her first shot at the National Rifle Association. CNN reports James has launched a stunningly bold suit to dissolve America’s top gun lobby group. The NRA is one of the most feared forces in American politics, spending billions to weaken gun control initiatives after mass shootings. It has also transformed the American constitutional right to bear arms into a cultural cause that dominates conservative politics. James accuses LaPierre and three other top NRA officers of years of breathtaking corruption. While destroying the organization over it would make her a hero among liberals, it may also have unintended consequences. Democrats who need to win rural, conservative, swing-state voters may wish she had waited until after the election.

entry.title: Recuerdo en Auschwitz-Bikernau a sinti y romaníes en el día de conmemoración de su genocidio

link.title: Recuerdo en Auschwitz-Bikernau a sinti y romaníes en el día de conmemoración de su genocidio

entry.content: Auschwitz-Bikernau, en Polonia, fue escenario este domingo del recuerdo conjunto por parte de cristianos, judíos y romaníes de las miles de personas allí asesinadas durante el régimen nazi. View on euronews
entry.summary: Auschwitz-Bikernau, en Polonia, fue escenario este domingo del recuerdo conjunto por parte de cristianos, judíos y romaníes de las miles de personas allí asesinadas durante el régimen nazi. View on euronews

entry.title: Tyranny expert explains how Donald Trump has ‘ceeded the election’ but is creating a crisis to ‘cling to power’

link.title: Tyranny expert explains how Donald Trump has ‘ceeded the election’ but is creating a crisis to ‘cling to power’

entry.content: Tyranny expert explains how Donald Trump has ‘ceeded the election’ but is creating a crisis to ‘cling to power’
entry.summary: Tyranny expert explains how Donald Trump has ‘ceeded the election’ but is creating a crisis to ‘cling to power’

entry.title: What To Order And Not To Oder At BBQ Restaurant

link.title: What To Order And Not To Oder At BBQ Restaurant

entry.content:
Insider asked chefs about their favorite and least favorite dishes to order at barbecue restaurants.
Always try the regional specialty.
Burnt ends are a classic and tasty barbecue dish.
Try the pork butt to gauge the quality of the restaurant.
The queso macaroni and cheese isn’t always a worthy side.
Green beans can be a lackluster side.
A hamburger usually isn’t the best thing on a barbecue menu.
entry.summary: Insider asked chefs about their favorite and least favorite dishes to order at barbecue restaurants. Always try the regional specialty. Burnt ends are a classic and tasty barbecue dish. Try the pork butt to gauge the quality of the restaurant. The queso macaroni and cheese isn’t always a worthy side. Green beans can be a lackluster side. A hamburger usually isn’t the best thing on a barbecue menu.

entry.title: Misbehaviour movie trailer - Keira Knightley, Gugu Mbatha-Raw, Jessie Buckley, Greg Kinnear

link.title: Misbehaviour movie trailer - Keira Knightley, Gugu Mbatha-Raw, Jessie Buckley, Greg Kinnear

entry.content:
Misbehaviour movie trailer - Plot synopsis: In 1970, the Miss World competition took place in London, hosted by US comedy legend, Bob Hope. At the time, Miss World was the most-watched TV show on the planet with over 100 million viewers. Claiming that beauty competitions demeaned women, the newly formed Women’s Liberation Movement achieved overnight fame by invading the stage and disrupting the live broadcast of the competition. Not only that, when the show resumed, the result caused uproar: the winner was not the Swedish favorite but Miss Grenada, the first black woman to be crowned Miss World. In a matter of hours, a global audience had witnessed the patriarchy driven from the stage and the Western ideal of beauty turned on its head.
directed by Philippa Lowthorpe
starring Keira Knightley, Gugu Mbatha-Raw, Jessie Buckley, Greg Kinnear, Lesley Manville, Keeley Hawes, Rhys Ifans, Phyllis Logan, Suki Waterhouse, Emma Corrin
release date September 25, 2020 (in select U.S. theaters and on VOD)
entry.summary: Misbehaviour movie trailer - Plot synopsis: In 1970, the Miss World competition took place in London, hosted by US comedy legend, Bob Hope. At the time, Miss World was the most-watched TV show on the planet with over 100 million viewers. Claiming that beauty competitions demeaned women, the newly formed Women’s Liberation Movement achieved overnight fame by invading the stage and disrupting the live broadcast of the competition. Not only that, when the show resumed, the result caused uproar: the winner was not the Swedish favorite but Miss Grenada, the first black woman to be crowned Miss World. In a matter of hours, a global audience had witnessed the patriarchy driven from the stage and the Western ideal of beauty turned on its head. directed by Philippa Lowthorpe starring Keira Knightley, Gugu Mbatha-Raw, Jessie Buckley, Greg Kinnear, Lesley Manville, Keeley Hawes, Rhys Ifans, Phyllis Logan, Suki Waterhouse, Emma Corrin release date September 25, 2020 (in select U.S. theaters and on VOD)

entry.title: Despite The Pandemic, Americans Still Love The Open Road

link.title: Despite The Pandemic, Americans Still Love The Open Road

entry.content:
With a novel coronavirus case count nearing five million, the United States now holds about a quarter of all the COVID-19 cases in the world.
According to CNN, more than,162,000 Americans have died in the pandemic so far.
As of this week, five states account for more than 40% of US infections: California, Florida, Texas, New York, and Georgia.
The pandemic shows no sign of slowing. However, that hasn’t stopped the surge of school districts across the country from planning to re-open schools.
Likewise, the 80th annual Sturgis Motorcycle Rally in South Dakota intends to go ahead. Normally, the event attracts hundreds of thousands of people.
While organizers say the event will be ‘scaled down,’ public health officials fear the virus will run rampant in bars, parties, and other gatherings.
entry.summary: With a novel coronavirus case count nearing five million, the United States now holds about a quarter of all the COVID-19 cases in the world. According to CNN, more than,162,000 Americans have died in the pandemic so far. As of this week, five states account for more than 40% of US infections: California, Florida, Texas, New York, and Georgia. The pandemic shows no sign of slowing. However, that hasn’t stopped the surge of school districts across the country from planning to re-open schools. Likewise, the 80th annual Sturgis Motorcycle Rally in South Dakota intends to go ahead. Normally, the event attracts hundreds of thousands of people. While organizers say the event will be ‘scaled down,’ public health officials fear the virus will run rampant in bars, parties, and other gatherings.

entry.title: No Check For You! CNN’s Poppy Harlow Claps Back At Trump’s Top Economic Adviser

link.title: No Check For You! CNN’s Poppy Harlow Claps Back At Trump’s Top Economic Adviser

entry.content:
Larry Kudlow is against Americans getting any further weekly payments of $600 as supplemental unemployment benefits.
CNN reports the top economic adviser to President Donald Trump reasons, if you get paid more to stay at home than go to work, why would you go to work?
I think it is a disincentive to go back to work. We think we can create a much better balance to provide incentives to come back to work. Larry Kudlow Economic Adviser, Trump Administration
In an interview with CNN’s Poppy Harlow, Kudlow cited a recent University of Chicago study as evidence backing the claim.
The study found two-thirds of people receiving benefits are making more money on unemployment than they were when they were working.
But Harlow pushed back, saying she’d spoken to the authors who said the checks were by no means keeping people at home.
Furthermore, Harlow added, the ongoing pandemic puts many people at greater risk if they return to the workplace.
Larry, it’s not safe! It’s not safe for a number of people to go back to work! Poppy Harlow CNN Journalist
entry.summary: Larry Kudlow is against Americans getting any further weekly payments of $600 as supplemental unemployment benefits. CNN reports the top economic adviser to President Donald Trump reasons, if you get paid more to stay at home than go to work, why would you go to work? I think it is a disincentive to go back to work. We think we can create a much better balance to provide incentives to come back to work. Larry Kudlow Economic Adviser, Trump Administration In an interview with CNN’s Poppy Harlow, Kudlow cited a recent University of Chicago study as evidence backing the claim. The study found two-thirds of people receiving benefits are making more money on unemployment than they were when they were working. But Harlow pushed back, saying she’d spoken to the authors who said the checks were by no means keeping people at home. Furthermore, Harlow added, the ongoing pandemic puts many people at greater risk if they return to the workplace. Larry, it’s not safe! It’s not safe for a number of people to go back to work! Poppy Harlow CNN Journalist

entry.title: Shoaib Akhtar reveals why he bowled a beamer to MS Dhoni in faisalabad Test? Oneindia Sports

link.title: Shoaib Akhtar reveals why he bowled a beamer to MS Dhoni in faisalabad Test? Oneindia Sports

entry.content:
Akhtar conceded that he deliberately bowled the beamer to Dhoni, which stemmed out of frustration “I think I had bowled a 8-9 over spell in Faisalabad. It was a quick spell and Dhoni scored a hundred. I purposely bowled a beamer to Dhoni and then apologised to him,” Akhtar told Aakash Chopra on his YouTube channel. Incidentally, Dhoni scored his maiden ODI and Test tons in his fifth match of each format. Both centuries produced scores of 148 and happened to be against Pakistan.
शोएब अख्तर की छवि क्रिकेट की दुनिया में एक ऐसे गेंदबाज के रूप में थी. जो किसी भी बल्लेबाज को कभी भी घायल कर सकता था. अपने करियर के दौरान शोएब अख्तर ने कई बार ऐसा किया भी. जब उन्होंने अपनी खतरनाक गेंदबाजी से विपक्षी बल्लेबाज को बुरी तरह से घायल कर दिया. शोएब अख्तर काफी अग्रेसिव थे. उन्हें विकेट नहीं मिलता था तो वो बल्लेबाजों को घायल करने के लिए जाते थे. ताकि खिलाड़ी रिटायर्ड हर्ट होकर पवेलियन लौट आए. ये आज भी प्लान शोएब अख्तर अपने यूट्यूब चैनल पर बताते रहते हैं कि वो बल्लेबाजों को हिट करने के लिए जाते थे. एक ऐसी ही घटना के बारे में खुलासा खुद शोएब अख्तर ने किया है.
#ShoaibAkhtar #MSDhoni #TeamIndia
entry.summary: Akhtar conceded that he deliberately bowled the beamer to Dhoni, which stemmed out of frustration “I think I had bowled a 8-9 over spell in Faisalabad. It was a quick spell and Dhoni scored a hundred. I purposely bowled a beamer to Dhoni and then apologised to him,” Akhtar told Aakash Chopra on his YouTube channel. Incidentally, Dhoni scored his maiden ODI and Test tons in his fifth match of each format. Both centuries produced scores of 148 and happened to be against Pakistan. शोएब अख्तर की छवि क्रिकेट की दुनिया में एक ऐसे गेंदबाज के रूप में थी. जो किसी भी बल्लेबाज को कभी भी घायल कर सकता था. अपने करियर के दौरान शोएब अख्तर ने कई बार ऐसा किया भी. जब उन्होंने अपनी खतरनाक गेंदबाजी से विपक्षी बल्लेबाज को बुरी तरह से घायल कर दिया. शोएब अख्तर काफी अग्रेसिव थे. उन्हें विकेट नहीं मिलता था तो वो बल्लेबाजों को घायल करने के लिए जाते थे. ताकि खिलाड़ी रिटायर्ड हर्ट होकर पवेलियन लौट आए. ये आज भी प्लान शोएब अख्तर अपने यूट्यूब चैनल पर बताते रहते हैं कि वो बल्लेबाजों को हिट करने के लिए जाते थे. एक ऐसी ही घटना के बारे में खुलासा खुद शोएब अख्तर ने किया है. #ShoaibAkhtar #MSDhoni #TeamIndia

entry.title: Sushant Singh Rajput Case: CBI जांच से पहले वापस लौटी पटना पुलिस, दिया ये बड़ा बयान वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Sushant Singh Rajput Case: CBI जांच से पहले वापस लौटी पटना पुलिस, दिया ये बड़ा बयान वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
The four-member Patna police team, which went to investigate the alleged suicide case of Sushant Singh Rajput, returned to Patna from Mumbai on Thursday. The team will submit its report to Patna’s Superintendent of Police Upendra Sharma.
सुशांत सिंह राजपूत के कथित आत्महत्या मामले को लेकर जांच करने गई चार सदस्यीय पटना पुलिस टीम गुरुवार को मुम्बई से पटना लौट आई. यह टीम अपनी रिपोर्ट पटना के वरिष्ठ पुलिस अधीक्षक उपेंद्र शर्मा को सौंपेगी.
#SushantSinghRajput #SushantSinghRajputCase #PatnaPolice
entry.summary: The four-member Patna police team, which went to investigate the alleged suicide case of Sushant Singh Rajput, returned to Patna from Mumbai on Thursday. The team will submit its report to Patna’s Superintendent of Police Upendra Sharma. सुशांत सिंह राजपूत के कथित आत्महत्या मामले को लेकर जांच करने गई चार सदस्यीय पटना पुलिस टीम गुरुवार को मुम्बई से पटना लौट आई. यह टीम अपनी रिपोर्ट पटना के वरिष्ठ पुलिस अधीक्षक उपेंद्र शर्मा को सौंपेगी. #SushantSinghRajput #SushantSinghRajputCase #PatnaPolice

entry.title: Zakletva 245 epizoda sa prevodom (Yemin turska serija) Kraj 2 sezone

link.title: Zakletva 245 epizoda sa prevodom (Yemin turska serija) Kraj 2 sezone

entry.content:
Ljubavne i Turske serije sa prevodom
YT kanal: youtube.com/c/ExYuLjubavneserije
sajt:
Yemin Bölüm Izle - Serija Zavjet (Zakletva) prati skromnu i lepu devojku Rejhan, koja je odrasla na selu, odgojena prema tradicionalnim načelima. Nakon smrti majke, Rejhan ostaje siroče, ali joj se život potpuno neočekivano menja. Želeći da obuzda svog razmaženog i neodgovornog sina Emira, Rejhanin stric Hikmet je dovodi u Istanbul kako bi ih venčao. Rejhan se na početku protivila tome, ali kako posle smrti majke nema nikoga na svetu osim Hikmeta, obećeva mu da će pristati na taj brak.
Emir isprva ne želi da se oženi jer previse voli svoju slobodu, ali Hikmet uspeva da ga prisili na brak. Zbog toga što je nateran na to, Emir se zaklinje da će se prema Rejhan ponašati toliko loše, da će sama zatražiti razvod od njega, a on će povratiti svoju slobodu. Njihov brak ne prihvata ni njegova majka Džavidan, koja od tog trenutka, kao i sam Emir, čini sve da Rejhan zagorča život u kući…
entry.summary: Ljubavne i Turske serije sa prevodom YT kanal: youtube.com/c/ExYuLjubavneserije sajt: Yemin Bölüm Izle - Serija Zavjet (Zakletva) prati skromnu i lepu devojku Rejhan, koja je odrasla na selu, odgojena prema tradicionalnim načelima. Nakon smrti majke, Rejhan ostaje siroče, ali joj se život potpuno neočekivano menja. Želeći da obuzda svog razmaženog i neodgovornog sina Emira, Rejhanin stric Hikmet je dovodi u Istanbul kako bi ih venčao. Rejhan se na početku protivila tome, ali kako posle smrti majke nema nikoga na svetu osim Hikmeta, obećeva mu da će pristati na taj brak. Emir isprva ne želi da se oženi jer previse voli svoju slobodu, ali Hikmet uspeva da ga prisili na brak. Zbog toga što je nateran na to, Emir se zaklinje da će se prema Rejhan ponašati toliko loše, da će sama zatražiti razvod od njega, a on će povratiti svoju slobodu. Njihov brak ne prihvata ni njegova majka Džavidan, koja od tog trenutka, kao i sam Emir, čini sve da Rejhan zagorča život u kući…

entry.title: IPL 2020 : Jio,Flipkart,Amazon and Unacademy in race of IPL season 13 title Sponsor

link.title: IPL 2020 : Jio,Flipkart,Amazon and Unacademy in race of IPL season 13 title Sponsor

entry.content:
The 2020 IPL will be played from September 19 to November 10, as confirmed by the IPL Governing Council. Vivo, a phone brand based in China, had acquired the IPL title sponsorship for Rs 2,199 crore in 2018 in a five-year deal. InsideSport, meanwhile has reliably learnt from its sources that initial conversations have already started with few brands. According to the information available, Reliance Jio, Byju’s, Amazon and few others have started making exploratory calls to the BCCI office for the IPL 2020 title sponsorships.
वीवो इंडिया ने आईपीएल 2020 से अपनी कन्नी काट ली है. यानी आईपीएल सीजन 13 में इस बार वीवो टाईटल स्पोंसर नहीं होगा. लगातार विरोध के बाद वीवो ने खुद ही आईपीएल से हटने का फैसला किया है. हालाँकि, हटने की मुख्य वजह सेल्स में आई गिरावट बताई जा रही है. पर सच्चाई ये भी है कि चीन और भारत के बीच इस समय रिश्ते ठीक नहीं है. बॉर्डर पर हमारे 20 जवान शहीद हुए थे. जिसकी वजह से देश भर में लोगों ने वीवो का विरोध किया है. और टाईटल स्पोंसर से हटने का फैसला हुआ. अब खबरें आ रही है कि आईपीएल सीजन 13 के टाईटल स्पोंसर की रेस में दो तीन कम्पनियां है. जियो, अमेजन, फ्लिपकार्ट और अनएक्डेमी.
#IPL #UAE #VIVO
entry.summary: The 2020 IPL will be played from September 19 to November 10, as confirmed by the IPL Governing Council. Vivo, a phone brand based in China, had acquired the IPL title sponsorship for Rs 2,199 crore in 2018 in a five-year deal. InsideSport, meanwhile has reliably learnt from its sources that initial conversations have already started with few brands. According to the information available, Reliance Jio, Byju’s, Amazon and few others have started making exploratory calls to the BCCI office for the IPL 2020 title sponsorships. वीवो इंडिया ने आईपीएल 2020 से अपनी कन्नी काट ली है. यानी आईपीएल सीजन 13 में इस बार वीवो टाईटल स्पोंसर नहीं होगा. लगातार विरोध के बाद वीवो ने खुद ही आईपीएल से हटने का फैसला किया है. हालाँकि, हटने की मुख्य वजह सेल्स में आई गिरावट बताई जा रही है. पर सच्चाई ये भी है कि चीन और भारत के बीच इस समय रिश्ते ठीक नहीं है. बॉर्डर पर हमारे 20 जवान शहीद हुए थे. जिसकी वजह से देश भर में लोगों ने वीवो का विरोध किया है. और टाईटल स्पोंसर से हटने का फैसला हुआ. अब खबरें आ रही है कि आईपीएल सीजन 13 के टाईटल स्पोंसर की रेस में दो तीन कम्पनियां है. जियो, अमेजन, फ्लिपकार्ट और अनएक्डेमी. #IPL #UAE #VIVO

entry.title: DOOM Eternal - The Ancient Gods: Part One Campaign Teaser (2020)

link.title: DOOM Eternal - The Ancient Gods: Part One Campaign Teaser (2020)

entry.content:
The first glimpse of DOOM Eternal’s first campaign expansion, then see the full trailer reveal at Opening Night Live, August 27th, 2020 at 2pm ET. Subscribe #XboxViewTV ➤
Your victory over Hell’s armies pulled humanity back from the edge of extinction, but it came at a cost. An imbalance of power in the heavens requires the true ruler of this universe to rise and set things right. Wage war across never-before-seen realms of the DOOM Universe and fight against new demons in your never-ending battle against the forces of evil.
—
Connect with us!
▸Support us:
▸Dailymotion:
▸Facebook:
▸Twitter:
▸Twitch:
▸Web:
entry.summary: The first glimpse of DOOM Eternal’s first campaign expansion, then see the full trailer reveal at Opening Night Live, August 27th, 2020 at 2pm ET. Subscribe #XboxViewTV ➤ Your victory over Hell’s armies pulled humanity back from the edge of extinction, but it came at a cost. An imbalance of power in the heavens requires the true ruler of this universe to rise and set things right. Wage war across never-before-seen realms of the DOOM Universe and fight against new demons in your never-ending battle against the forces of evil. — Connect with us! ▸Support us: ▸Dailymotion: ▸Facebook: ▸Twitter: ▸Twitch: ▸Web:

entry.title: PM will take Tory rape case ‘very seriously’

link.title: PM will take Tory rape case ‘very seriously’

entry.content: Prime Minister Boris Johnson says it is important that the rape allegations made against a Tory MP are taken "very seriously", but it will be up to the police to decide whether to make charges. The MP, a former Minister still serving in parliament, was arrested on Friday and bailed over the weekend. Report by Etemadil. Like us on Facebook at and follow us on Twitter at
entry.summary: Prime Minister Boris Johnson says it is important that the rape allegations made against a Tory MP are taken "very seriously", but it will be up to the police to decide whether to make charges. The MP, a former Minister still serving in parliament, was arrested on Friday and bailed over the weekend. Report by Etemadil. Like us on Facebook at and follow us on Twitter at

entry.title: Lorenzo-Vera démarre fort - Golf - USPGA

link.title: Lorenzo-Vera démarre fort - Golf - USPGA

entry.content: Mike Lorenzo-Vera a pris la troisième place de l’USPGA après le premier tour. Le Français signe un solide 68 pour sa reprise après cinq mois sans compétition.
entry.summary: Mike Lorenzo-Vera a pris la troisième place de l’USPGA après le premier tour. Le Français signe un solide 68 pour sa reprise après cinq mois sans compétition.

entry.title: Daisy Edgar-Jones says she and Marianne have similar approaches to make-up

link.title: Daisy Edgar-Jones says she and Marianne have similar approaches to make-up

entry.content: Daisy Edgar-Jones says she and her ‘Normal People’ character Marianne Sheridan have similar approaches to make-up and the book like a dramatic cat-eye.
entry.summary: Daisy Edgar-Jones says she and her ‘Normal People’ character Marianne Sheridan have similar approaches to make-up and the book like a dramatic cat-eye.

entry.title: Nîmes - OM (0-1) : le résumé

link.title: Nîmes - OM (0-1) : le résumé

entry.content: Le résumé vidéo de la rencontre entre l’OM et Nîmes, remportée par les Marseillais sur le plus petit des scores (1-0).
entry.summary: Le résumé vidéo de la rencontre entre l’OM et Nîmes, remportée par les Marseillais sur le plus petit des scores (1-0).

entry.title: Erick Thohir: Bantuan Rp 600.000 Cair September 2020

link.title: Erick Thohir: Bantuan Rp 600.000 Cair September 2020

entry.content:
JAKARTA, KOMPASTV Dalam rangka mendorong konsumsi masyarakat di tengah pandemi Covid-19 ini, pemerintah akhirnya gelontorkan bantuan untuk masyarakat.
Terutama bagi mereka yang adalah pekerja non PNS dan BUMN yang aktif terdaftar di BPJS Ketenagakerjaan dengan iuran di bawah Rp 150.000 per bulan atau setara dengan gaji di bawah Rp 5 juta per bulan.
Nominal bantuan yang didapatkan sebesar 600 ribu rupiah selama 4 bulan.
Bantuan akann ditransfer ke rekening warga per 2 bulan sekali.
Ketua Pelaksana Komite Penanganan Covid-19 dan Pemulihan Ekonomi Nasional Erick Thohir mengatakan, stimulus gaji bagi para pekerja dengan pendapatan tertentu akan disalurkan mulai September 2020.
"Program stimulus ini sedang difinalisasi agar bisa dijalankan oleh Kementerian Ketenagakerjaan di bulan September 2020 ini," ujar Erick dalam keterangan tertulisnya, dikutip dari Kompas.com Kamis (6/8/2020).
entry.summary: JAKARTA, KOMPASTV Dalam rangka mendorong konsumsi masyarakat di tengah pandemi Covid-19 ini, pemerintah akhirnya gelontorkan bantuan untuk masyarakat. Terutama bagi mereka yang adalah pekerja non PNS dan BUMN yang aktif terdaftar di BPJS Ketenagakerjaan dengan iuran di bawah Rp 150.000 per bulan atau setara dengan gaji di bawah Rp 5 juta per bulan. Nominal bantuan yang didapatkan sebesar 600 ribu rupiah selama 4 bulan. Bantuan akann ditransfer ke rekening warga per 2 bulan sekali. Ketua Pelaksana Komite Penanganan Covid-19 dan Pemulihan Ekonomi Nasional Erick Thohir mengatakan, stimulus gaji bagi para pekerja dengan pendapatan tertentu akan disalurkan mulai September 2020. "Program stimulus ini sedang difinalisasi agar bisa dijalankan oleh Kementerian Ketenagakerjaan di bulan September 2020 ini," ujar Erick dalam keterangan tertulisnya, dikutip dari Kompas.com Kamis (6/8/2020).

entry.title: New thriller - shot in Sheffield - coming to Don Valley Bowl drive-in cinema

link.title: New thriller - shot in Sheffield - coming to Don Valley Bowl drive-in cinema

entry.content:
A new British independent thriller, shot on location in Sheffield, is to be screened at a drive-in cinema at Don Valley Bowl.
‘Break’ is a life affirming rags-to-riches story, following the troubled but talented Spencer Pryde (Sam Gittins) - a gifted inner-city kid, wasting his life on petty crime and violence, until a chance encounter with a former ‘eight ball’ pool champion, Vince Qiang (David Yip), and tough guy club owner, Ray (Rutger Hauer), presents him with the opportunity to turn his life around.
entry.summary: A new British independent thriller, shot on location in Sheffield, is to be screened at a drive-in cinema at Don Valley Bowl. ‘Break’ is a life affirming rags-to-riches story, following the troubled but talented Spencer Pryde (Sam Gittins) - a gifted inner-city kid, wasting his life on petty crime and violence, until a chance encounter with a former ‘eight ball’ pool champion, Vince Qiang (David Yip), and tough guy club owner, Ray (Rutger Hauer), presents him with the opportunity to turn his life around.

entry.title: Twitter Bans David Duke

link.title: Twitter Bans David Duke

entry.content:
CNN Business reports that Twitter permanently banned David Duke’s account on Thursday night.
The former Ku Klux Klan leader’s ban comes after multiple violations of the company’s hateful conduct policy.
Twitter forbids accounts that "promote violence against or directly attack or threaten other people" on the basis of personal characteristics.
Earlier this week, Twitter said it would block and or suspend accounts and links sharing blocked or hateful content.
It’s unclear what specific action triggered Duke’s suspension, but Twitter told CNN their decision was "in line with our recently-updated guidance on harmful links."
This week, Twitter also temporarily restricted Donald Trump Jr’s account, after he posted a video which made false claims about coronavirus.
entry.summary: CNN Business reports that Twitter permanently banned David Duke’s account on Thursday night. The former Ku Klux Klan leader’s ban comes after multiple violations of the company’s hateful conduct policy. Twitter forbids accounts that "promote violence against or directly attack or threaten other people" on the basis of personal characteristics. Earlier this week, Twitter said it would block and or suspend accounts and links sharing blocked or hateful content. It’s unclear what specific action triggered Duke’s suspension, but Twitter told CNN their decision was "in line with our recently-updated guidance on harmful links." This week, Twitter also temporarily restricted Donald Trump Jr’s account, after he posted a video which made false claims about coronavirus.

entry.title: Caitlyn Jenner says ‘I’m A Celebrity’ was easier to cope with than global health crisis

link.title: Caitlyn Jenner says ‘I’m A Celebrity’ was easier to cope with than global health crisis

entry.content: Caitlyn Jenner joked the ‘I’m A Celebrity… Get Me Out Of Here!’ jungle was easier to cope with than the Covid-19 pandemic and "eating a cow’s eyeball seems like nothing".
entry.summary: Caitlyn Jenner joked the ‘I’m A Celebrity… Get Me Out Of Here!’ jungle was easier to cope with than the Covid-19 pandemic and "eating a cow’s eyeball seems like nothing".
